text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: ...Why can't I make it more than five steps?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I can't let anyone see me like this!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
As class representative, I have to Bakushin...
URGH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She appears to be quite fatigued. I should
rearrange her race schedule for now.
